topics.label: Tasks
topics.description: xTaskCreate, vTaskDelay, priorities. FreeRTOS tasks are preemptive threads.

topics.label: Queues
topics.description: xQueueCreate, xQueueSend, xQueueReceive for inter-task communication.

topics.label: Semaphores & Mutexes
topics.description: Binary/counting semaphores and mutexes for synchronization.

topics.label: Timers
topics.description: Software timers with xTimerCreate for periodic and one-shot callbacks.

topics.label: Memory Management
topics.description: Heap implementations (heap_1 through heap_5) and stack overflow detection.
